steps.title: Identify milvus troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your milvus installation:
```bash
pip show pymilvus | grep Version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review milvus configuration
steps.description:

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: memInfo.RSS undefined
steps.description:
This PR fixes #41384 .

When using milvus client and compile on windows, the compilation failed with the undefined RSS error.

On windows, the way to get memory used is the same as on darwin.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: memInfo.RSS undefined is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test milvus to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This PR fixes #41384 .

When using milvus client and compile on windows, the compilation failed with the undefined RSS error.

On windows, the way to get memory used is the same as on darwin.
